title: Hanson’s support for Trump deportation policy ‘makes me sick’, Monique Ryan says – as it happened
summary_full: Follow today’s news liveGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastAlpine ski resorts in New South Wales and Victoria saw climate records shattered at the weekend with maximum temperatures up to 12C above average.Ski areas of Mount Hotham and Falls Creek set July records for their hottest daytime and night-time temperatures and Thredbo also set a new hottest July day, according to the Bureau of Meteorology.We want to see more Australian ideas commercialised, more Australian technology deployed globally, and more of the economic value harnessed here at home.
